summary: Game Tile Pregame FGotD Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND Hide Spoilers is turned ON
AND a Free Game of the Day is on the schedule
AND the user is on the Games page

steps.action: WHEN the user assigns focus to a FGotD game tile that is not yet live
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Game <x> of <y>, <away_team> at <home_team>, <game_start_time> Game Start Time, Free Game of the Day, Press select to play game. Move <appropriate_directions> to hear more games. Move up to navigate to a new date."
